channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Exclusive: Headspace’s new AI chatbot will offer mental health support to subscribers
item.description: Mental health app Headspace has launched a generative AI-powered chatbot called Ebb for users to get instant, personalized support through life’s ebbs and flows, the company exclusively told Fast Company.
item.dc:creator: Jessica Bursztynsky, Fast Company

item.title: The illusion of trust in AI-generated code
item.description: GenAI could offer developers unprecedented efficiency and capability - it also introduces significant security risks.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Agatha All Along episode 5 just confirmed who Joe Locke's Teen really is – and he's exactly who I thought he was
item.description: Agatha All Along's fifth episode has revealed Teen's real identity, even though it didn't tell us his actual name.
item.dc:creator: tom.power@futurenet.com (Tom Power), TechRadar

item.title: Marriott hit with major penalty to settle security breach claims
item.description: Marriott International will have to pay a $52 million penalty to 49 states and the District of Columbia for multiple breaches.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Nvidia RTX 5070 could launch at CES 2025, and rumored spec – including 12GB of VRAM – means everyone hates this GPU already
item.description: Nvidia RTX 5070 might be revealed alongside RTX 5080 and 5090 at CES 2025 – but this could be the last VRAM straw for some PC gamers.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Here’s what’s new in Office 2024
item.description: Microsoft has just released Office 2024, the new non-subscription version of its office suite. It’s available in three editions: Office Home 2024 for consumers, Office Home & Business 2024 for consumers and small businesses, and Office LTSC 2024 for midsize and large businesses.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: AI tracker charts growth in deepfakes ahead of election
item.description: The German Marshall Fund has launched a tool to track AI-generated deep fakes targeting elections that are circulating in the U.S. and across the globe. The tool comes in a historic year for elections.
item.dc:creator: Rebecca Beitsch, The Hill

item.title: Drasi: A lightweight approach to event-driven programming
item.description: The Microsoft Azure Incubations team is one of the more interesting components of Microsoft’s hyperscale cloud. It is something between a traditional software development team and a research organization working to build solutions to the problems of distributed systems at massive scale.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: CISO의 새로운 무기 ‘리스크 스토리텔링’ 역량 개발법
item.description: 리스크 스토리텔링 능력은 조직 내 실질적 변화를 이끄는 핵심 요소다. 효과적인 스토리는 사이버 보안 리스크를 부각해 주의를 환기시키고, 최종적으로 구체적 행동을 유도한다. 칼라일그룹(Carlyle Group)의 CISO 베서니 드 루드는 “무엇이든 대화의 주제가 되면 우선순위로 올라가게 마련이다. 그래서 우리는 사이버 보안에 대해 대화해야 한다”라고 설명했다. 드 루드가 말하는 것은 단순한 기술적 통제에 관한 낡은 이야기가 아니다.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: AI as a catalyst for ESG: Empowering CIOs to drive sustainable innovation
item.description: In today’s fast-evolving business landscape, environmental, social and governance (ESG) criteria have become fundamental to corporate responsibility and long-term success.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: PMI, 프로젝트 성공의 기준 재정립한다 “11월 연구 결과 공개”
item.description: 글로벌 프로젝트 관리 기관 PMI(Project Management Institute)가 프로젝트 성공에 대한 정의와 프로젝트 전문가의 역할에 대한 기존 관념을 바꿀 새로운 연구를 11월 공개한다고 밝혔다. 이 조직의 새로운 정의에 따르면 ‘성공적인 프로젝트란 투입한 노력과 비용 대비 가치 있는 결과를 창출하는 것’이다. PMI는 프로젝트 성공의 개념을 새롭게 정립하는 야심 찬 시도라며, 앞으로 프로젝트 전문가들의 역할 인식에 근본적인 변화를 가져올 것으로 예상했다.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Why it’s important to support fintechs in the acceleration age
item.description: In a time where the digital world is shifting beneath our feet, the speed of technological change can feel like it has never been greater. Tech advancements achieve widespread adoption seemingly at breakneck speeds.
item.dc:creator: Vanessa Colella, Fast Company

item.title: Deno 2.0 arrives, ready to battle Node.js
item.description: Deno 2.0, a major update to the open source Deno runtime for JavaScript, TypeScript, and WebAssembly, is now available as a production release. It emphasizes backward compatibility with the rival Node.js runtime and NPM and a stabilized standard library.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Google could be forced to sell parts of its business if the DOJ gets its way
item.description: The U.S. Department of Justice is considering asking a federal judge to force Google to sell parts of its business in order to eliminate its online search monopoly.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: Twin boys born conjoined celebrate 1st birthday after separation surgery
item.description: Twin brothers who were born conjoined recently celebrated their first birthday after undergoing successful separation surgery.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Climate solution: Form Energy secures $405M to speed development of long-awaited 100-hour battery
item.description: Form Energy, a company that is beginning to produce a longer-lasting alternative to lithium batteries, hit a milestone Wednesday with an announcement of $405 million in funding.
item.dc:creator: Isabella O'Malley, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Effective EDR: Balancing testing rigor and velocity
item.description: Various industries are still dealing with the consequences of the July 2024 technology outage which led to a "blue screen of death" and extreme disruptions. The post Effective EDR: Balancing testing rigor and velocity first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: commentators, Federal News Network

item.title: Google scientists share Nobel Prize in chemistry for AI protein work
item.description: Two Google DeepMind scientists shared the 2024 Nobel Prize in chemistry with a US professor for their breakthrough research into proteins.
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg, The Mercury News

item.title: Ransomware attack impacts 237,000 Comcast customers
item.description: Debt agency breach exposes 237,700 Comcast customers' personal data. Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson explains what happened and provides six tips to help protect yourself from such a breach.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: American Water cyberattack renews focus on protecting critical infrastructure
item.description: CAMDEN, N.J. (AP) — A cyberattack continues to affect the largest regulated water and wastewater utility company in the United States, renewing a focus on the importance of protecting critical infrastructure sites.
item.dc:creator: BRUCE SHIPKOWSKI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Atlassian’s genAI assistant Rovo is now available
item.description: Atlassian’s Rovo generative AI (genAI) assistant, which launched as a preview release in May, is now available for users. The company bills Rovo as an “AI-powered” knowledge discovery tool that lets teams access information across their organization more efficiently.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Climate change boosted Helene's deadly rain and wind and scientists say same is likely for Milton
item.description: Scientists say human-caused climate change boosted the rainfall of deadly Hurricane Helene by about 10% and intensified its winds by about 11%.
item.dc:creator: Alexa St. John, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: TikTok is designed to be addictive to kids and causes them harm, US states' lawsuits say
item.description: More than a dozen states and the District of Columbia filed lawsuits against TikTok on Tuesday, saying that the popular short-form video app is designed to be addictive to kids and harms their mental health.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO and BARBARA ORTUTAY, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Julia language adds lower-overhead Memory type
item.description: A new version of the dynamically typed, high-performance Julia language for numerical computing has been released. Julia 1.11 features a new Memory type, a lower-level container that provides an alternative to Array. Downloadable from julialang.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Former Google engineer and ‘Godfather of AI’ Geoffrey Hinton among Nobel Prize winners in physics
item.description: One of the most influential academics in artificial intelligence, Geoffrey E. Hinton, has been awarded the Nobel Prize in physics for training artificial neural networks and laying the foundations for today’s machine learning applications.
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg, The Mercury News

item.title: Red Sea cable cuts disrupted up to 70% of traffic, says RETN
item.description: Independent global network services provider RETN says its network diagnostics show that the February 2024 cable cuts in the Red Sea, initially reported to have affected 25% of data traffic between Europe and Asia, caused far more disruption than originally estimated.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Wi-Fi 7 brings enterprise-caliber predictability to wireless networks, says Cisco CTO
item.description: The ability to more effectively control wireless networks will go a long way toward making Wi-Fi 7 a viable upgrade for current over-the-air networks and, in some cases, even hard-wired environments. The evolution of Wi-Fi 7 has included more than a decade of spectrum changes and standards updates.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: 5 ways companies can use time series forecasting
item.description: Time series forecasting is a powerful machine learning method that leverages historical time-stamped data to predict future events and help reduce uncertainty from business conditions — for example, to accurately predict sales, inventory levels, and even manufacturing data.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: 10 tech tips and tricks everyone should know
item.description: There are a handful of ways you can make your tech experience less annoying, including through fixing autocorrect, turning off certain notifications and by creating folders on your iPhone.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: What to stream: Coldplay, an unhinged Charlie Puth, 'Salem’s Lot,' Sarah Paulson and NHL 25
item.description: Coldplay's 10th studio album and the American Music Awards celebrating their 50th anniversary are some of the new television, films, music and games headed to a device near you.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Navigating the federal AI frontier: Top priorities for incoming chief AI officers
item.description: There are ten key focus areas for current and prospective agency CAIOs to consider to ensure and maximize the benefits and minimize the risks of AI. The post Navigating the federal AI frontier: Top priorities for incoming chief AI officers first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: commentators, Federal News Network

item.title: Google's search engine's latest AI injection will answer voiced questions about video and photos
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — Google is injecting its search engine with more artificial intelligence that will enable people to voice questions about images and occasionally organize an entire page of results, despite the technology's past misadventures with misleading information.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL LIEDTKE, Associated Press, Fox 5
